positional_bias.note: Positions 0 and 3 each appear twice (q2+q3 at 0; q4+q5 at 3). max_share = 0.40, which is not strictly > 0.40. Pass.

length_bias.note: All five MCQs clear the 1.20x threshold. Distractors in previously-flagged q1, q2, q5 were lengthened in cycle 2; correct answers no longer stand out by length. longest_correct_rate = 0.00.

verdict: Pass — all five checks clean. Length-bias fix verified: distractors for q1, q2, and q5 were lengthened in cycle 2; longest_correct_rate dropped from 0.60 to 0.00, well under the 0.40 threshold. Positional bias, distractor plausibility, objective coverage, and beginner-fairness all pass.
